data.description:
Blessing of the Green Knight
You have a favored domain, and you are granted certain powers that relate to it. The life domain, in particular, deals with nature, growth, healing, and protection. As a priest of this domain, you use your abilities to protect and nurture life.
Grants a creature you touch immunity to all damage until the end of your next turn.
A divine character can use their connection to a deity to gain abilities and benefits.
Domain spells, features, and blessings related to light.
